en: Does your company performs contractor services for the Railroad?
FRA Covered Service on Railroad Property – Does your company have FRA hours of service employees that will perform covered service on Railroad property?
49 CFR 214.7 – Does the work performed by your company occur on or near track or with the potential of fouling a track?
Railroad Track, Bridges, Roadways – Does your company's employees perform duties, within the US, involving the inspection, construction, maintenance or repair of Railroad track, bridges, roadways?
Signal and Communication Systems – Does your company's employees perform duties, within the US, involving the inspection, construction, maintenance or repair of signal and communication systems?
Electric Traction Systems – Does your company's employees perform duties, within the US, involving the inspection, construction, maintenance or repair of electric traction systems?
Roadway Facilities – Does your company's employees perform duties, within the US, involving the inspection, construction, maintenance or repair of roadway facilities?
Roadway Maintenance Machinery – Does your company's employees perform duties, within the US, involving the inspection, construction, maintenance or repair of roadway maintenance machinery?
In the U.S., your Flagman and/or Watchman/Lookout employees perform duties as defined in 49 CFR 214.7.
Flagman Watchman Lookout – Does your company's employees direct and/or provide warnings of movement of trains or on-track equipment?
